nl_query: 5. Which questions are grouped under the Choice group for attempt rule 1?
failed_sql:
SELECT q.id, q.code, q.max_marks, argq.group_label
FROM question q
JOIN attempt_rule_group_question argq ON argq.question_id = q.id
JOIN attempt_rule_group arg ON arg.id = argq.group_id
JOIN attempt_rule ar ON ar.id = arg.attempt_rule_id
WHERE argq.group_label = 'Choice' AND ar.id = 1
LIMIT 100;
